items.title: MOLD-EJECTOR-PIN-PUSH — Euler buckling-force check for SPI ejector pins
items.body: compute_ejector_pin_push(EjectorPinPushSpec) -> EjectorPinPushReport in kerf_mold.ejector_pin_push. F_cr = pi²·E·I/(K·L)² (Roark's 9e §15.2 + SPI/ANSI B151.1); E=200 GPa for all tool-steel grades (M2/H13/S7/D2); I=pi·d⁴/64; K=1.0 pinned-pinned (default), 0.5 fixed-fixed, 2.0 cantilever; DCR=required/F_cr; recommends smallest SPI-standard diameter with F_cr >= 1.1× required; short-column warning when K·L/d < 30. LLM tool mold_compute_ejector_pin_push registered; 45 oracle tests green. HONEST: Euler non-conservative for K·L/d < 30 — use Johnson formula in short-column regime; bushing friction and pin eccentricity NOT modelled.
